summary: Zero applicable changes. The faithful port (commit 6e7425e) already landed clean Kotlin idioms in this slice, and the test-specific rule changes from the brief intentionally exclude the few cosmetic wins that would have applied in main code.

patterns_searched.@JvmStatic occurrences: 54 across 35 files (test=51, testFixtures=3 helpers) — INTENTIONALLY KEPT per brief rule #1
patterns_searched.Optional.* call sites: 24 occurrences across 12 files — DEFERRED per brief rule #7 + prior-slice precedent
patterns_searched.try { ... } finally { ... }: 2 sites (TestWriteTransactionRetry.kt:148-167, ConcurrentWriterHarness.kt:92-125) — both multi-step orchestration teardowns (clear interrupt flag / shutdown executor + reset hook), NOT single-Closeable patterns

notes: The only .toLowerCase / .lowercase() call in this slice is JdbcDucklakeCatalogTestDataGenerator.kt:139 which already reads `testName.lowercase(Locale.ROOT)` — the faithful-port pass got it right.

All requireNonNull occurrences are in *.java.old files (testFixtures CatalogQueries, CatalogTestSupport, CatalogPredicates); the .kt translations already dropped them on non-nullable Kotlin params — no further cleanup needed.
Try/finally bodies do not match the brief's safe-conversion criterion ('clearly closing one Closeable, not orchestrating multi-step teardown'). Left as-is per brief rule #2.

not_applied.name: drop_jvmstatic_from_test_companions
not_applied.rationale: Brief mandatory rule #1: KEEP existing @JvmStatic in tests. JUnit may reflectively load companion-object helpers (e.g. @MethodSource providers, @BeforeAll hooks); the trino-main rule (drop because the module is 100% Kotlin) does not transfer to test code where the runner does reflective lookups.
not_applied.decision: Deliberately kept by policy. 51 sites in test/, 3 sites in testFixtures/ helpers.

not_applied.name: collapse_optional_to_nullable_on_internal_paths
not_applied.rationale: Deferred across all prior slices (trino-main, catalog-main). Per brief rule #7. Catalog tests use Optional<T> mostly to interface with the main-source API (DucklakeWriteFragment.partitionId: OptionalLong, etc.) — flipping at test-call boundaries would require coordinated changes in the main slice already kit-applied.

not_applied.name: resource_leak_fixes_use_block
not_applied.rationale: Brief rule #2: only swap try/finally → .use {} when the test was clearly closing one Closeable, not orchestrating a multi-step teardown. The two try/finally sites in this slice are: (1) TestWriteTransactionRetry restoring the interrupt flag, (2) ConcurrentWriterHarness shutting down the loser executor + resetting catalog.beforeWriteTransactionAction. Neither matches the safe-conversion criterion.
not_applied.decision: Not applicable — no safe conversions available.

not_applied.name: locale_root_lowercase
not_applied.rationale: Only one lowercase call exists in the slice (JdbcDucklakeCatalogTestDataGenerator.kt:139) and it already passes Locale.ROOT. Nothing to fix.
not_applied.decision: Not applicable — port was already correct.

not_applied.name: safe_sql_message
not_applied.rationale: Brief rule #4: fix only if the test is actually exercising an error path. No `.message!!` occurrences exist in this slice; the .kt translations either pass `e.message` through directly (System.Logger accepts Any?) or use `?:` defaults.

not_applied.name: convert_handles_to_jvm_record_data_class
not_applied.rationale: Brief rule #6: tests usually don't have Jackson-serialized handles. Confirmed: no @JsonCreator / handle-style data classes in this slice; tests only construct/consume the handles defined in main sources (which were already converted in trino-main slice).

not_applied.name: kotlin_collection_factories
not_applied.rationale: Survey returned zero `java.util.{List,Map,Set}.{of,copyOf}` calls in .kt sources. The faithful port already used Kotlin built-ins (emptyList(), listOf(), toList(), etc.).
not_applied.decision: Not applicable — port was already idiomatic.

not_applied.name: drop_requireNonNull_on_kotlin_non_null_params
not_applied.rationale: Survey returned zero requireNonNull occurrences in .kt sources. The faithful port already dropped them on non-nullable Kotlin params.
not_applied.decision: Not applicable — port was already correct.

shared_helpers_decision.rationale: With zero applicable changes, there is nothing to extract into a shared helper. The catalog-main slice (sibling, same module) also chose inline-only with the same rationale; the trino-main IdiomKit.kt remains the canonical reference if a future test ever needs lowercaseRoot / safeMessage.

verification.expected: 108/0/0/0 across 33 suites (matches .ai/kotlin-port/catalog-test/baseline.json and the catalog-main post-kit run)
verification.last_run: 2026-06-01 — UP-TO-DATE (no source changes). Parsed from on-disk TEST-*.xml: suites=33 tests=108 failures=0 errors=0 skipped=0. Matches baseline exactly.
